applyTo: "**"
---

# Code review instructions for Compass

Read this before reviewing a PR, suggesting code, or chatting in this repo. Detail beyond this file lives in [`docs/`](../../docs); link to it instead of restating.

## Project context

**Compass** is a local-first personal life planning desktop app. **Electron 41 + React 18 + TypeScript + Drizzle/SQLite + TipTap + Tailwind**. Everything stays on the user's Mac; only OAuth tokens leave (and only to Google + GitHub, scoped read-only). No telemetry, no analytics, no cloud sync.

Renderer code in `src/` has zero direct access to Node or Electron APIs — it must go through the preload/API bridge for that window (for example, `electron/preload.ts` → `window.api` in the main app and `electron/preload-quick-capture.ts` → `window.quickCaptureApi` in quick capture). The vault is AES-256-GCM encrypted with a key in the macOS Keychain.

---

## Review checklist (run through every PR)

### 🔴 Critical — block merge
- [ ] Does anything in `src/` import from `node:*`, `electron`, `fs`, `path`, etc.? **Reject.** Add an IPC handler instead.
- [ ] Does any new IPC handler in `electron/ipc/*.ts` accept a path argument? It MUST validate `fullPath.startsWith(ALLOWED_DIR)` before reading or writing. See `electron/ipc/knowledge.ts` for the canonical pattern.
- [ ] Are vault contents being logged, written outside `.vault/`, or sent over the network? **Reject.**
- [ ] Are OAuth tokens stored anywhere except via `safeStorage`? **Reject.**
- [ ] Are there new outbound `fetch`/`axios` calls to hosts outside Google APIs / GitHub API? Flag and ask why.
- [ ] Does the PR write to `knowledge-base/`, `.vault/`, `.data/`, `.env*`, or `*.db*` from the working tree? Lefthook should block this — if it slipped through, reject.
- [ ] Does a schema change in `electron/db/schema.ts` have a corresponding migration in `electron/db/migrations/`? (`npm run db:generate` should have produced it.)

### 🟠 Important — request changes
- [ ] New `alert()`, `confirm()`, or `window.confirm()` calls. Use `useToast()` from `src/components/ui/Toast.tsx` and `useConfirm()` from `src/components/ui/ConfirmDialog.tsx`.
- [ ] New `any` type without an inline `// biome-ignore lint/suspicious/noExplicitAny: <reason>` comment.
- [ ] New IPC handler that's missing one of: handler in `electron/ipc/*.ts`, bridge in `electron/preload.ts`, type in `src/types/electron.d.ts`. All three required, same PR.
- [ ] `useEffect` with `[]` deps that closes over a state value or prop (stale-closure footgun).
- [ ] New top-level dependency added without a sentence in the PR description on why an existing one isn't enough.
- [ ] Schema change without backward-compatibility consideration (existing user DBs need `ensureColumn()` in `electron/db/client.ts` — see prior migrations).
- [ ] PR title not Conventional Commits format (`feat:`/`fix:`/`chore:`/`docs:`/`refactor:`/`test:`).
- [ ] Missing `Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>` trailer if Claude touched the commit.

### 🟡 Nice to have — comment, don't block
- [ ] Non-trivial new logic without a unit test (test colocation: `foo.ts` → `foo.test.ts`). Vitest.
- [ ] Raw hex colors instead of Tailwind tokens (`bg-foreground`, `border-border`, `text-muted-foreground`, etc.).
- [ ] Icons from outside `lucide-react`.
- [ ] Click-only handler on a `<div>` without `onKeyDown` + `role="button"` + `tabIndex` for keyboard parity.
- [ ] Icon-only `<button>` without `aria-label`.
- [ ] `<button>` inside a `<form>` without `type="button"` (defaults to `submit`).
- [ ] List `.map((_, i) => <X key={i} />)` when a stable id is available.

---

## Hard constraints (security & data invariants)

These are enforced by hooks and CI; treat any violation as 🔴 critical.

| Constraint | Where it's enforced |
|---|---|
| Renderer never imports Node/Electron | `tsconfig.web.json` types boundary; convention |
| Vault key in OS Keychain via `safeStorage` only — never plaintext on disk | `electron/ipc/vault.ts` |
| Vault blobs AES-256-GCM with random 16-byte IV | `electron/ipc/vault.ts` |
| OAuth tokens encrypted via `safeStorage` | `electron/ipc/auth.ts` |
| Path-traversal sanitization on every filesystem IPC | `electron/ipc/knowledge.ts`, `electron/ipc/vault.ts` |
| `knowledge-base/`, `.vault/`, `.data/`, `.env*`, `*.db*` not commitable | Lefthook `block-data-dirs` hook |
| No analytics, no telemetry, no outbound calls except Google + GitHub APIs | Convention; CSP headers in `electron/main.ts` |
| Vault window opt-in `setContentProtection(true)` (blocks screenshots) | `src/pages/Vault.tsx` |

---

## Stack — don't suggest replacements

Compass has already evaluated alternatives. **Don't suggest swapping these out.**

| Concern | Tool |
|---|---|
| Lint + format | **Biome** (not ESLint+Prettier; ESLint kept only for `react-hooks` + `react-refresh` plugins) |
| Lint fast-tier | **Oxlint** (Rust, 50–100× ESLint speed) |
| Hook runner | **Lefthook** (not Husky) |
| ORM | **Drizzle** (not Prisma, not raw SQL helpers like `kysely`) |
| Tests | **Vitest** (not Jest), **Playwright** for Electron E2E |
| Editor | **TipTap** for the knowledge editor (not Slate, not raw ProseMirror) |
| Icons | **`lucide-react`** only |
| Styling | **Tailwind 3** with project tokens (no raw hex) |
| State | **Zustand** (no Redux, no MobX) |
| Routing | **React Router v6** |
| Native binary | **`better-sqlite3`** (rebuilt against Electron via `electron-builder install-app-deps`) |
| PDF parsing | **`pdf-parse`** (wraps pdfjs-dist legacy build) |
| XLSX parsing | **`exceljs`** |
| Cron | **`node-cron`** |

---

## Anti-patterns specific to this codebase

| Pattern | Why bad | Replace with |
|---|---|---|
| `if (!confirm('Delete?')) return` | Native dialogs, no styling, no a11y | `if (!await confirm({ title: 'Delete?', destructive: true })) return` (from `useConfirm`) |
| `alert('Error: ' + e)` | Same | `toast(\`Error: \${e}\`, 'error')` (from `useToast`) |
| `import Database from 'better-sqlite3'` in `src/` | Renderer can't access native modules | New IPC handler |
| `readFileSync('/some/path')` in `electron/ipc/*.ts` without path validation | Path traversal | Validate `fullPath.startsWith(KNOWLEDGE_DIR)` |
| `db.run('INSERT INTO ...')` (raw SQL) | Bypasses Drizzle types | `db.insert(table).values(...).run()` |
| `<input style={{ color: '#fff' }}>` | Bypasses theme tokens | `<input className="text-foreground">` |
| `useEffect(() => { ... }, [someState])` writing back to `someState` | Render loop | `useMemo` for derived state, or move logic out of effect |
| New global `fetch(...)` to a non-API host | Telemetry concern | Justify in PR; usually wrong |

---

## Don't flag these (intentional)

These are documented or part of an in-flight cleanup; flagging them adds noise.

- **Demoted Biome rules** (warnings, not errors): `useExhaustiveDependencies`, `noAssignInExpressions` (in CSV date parsers), `noArrayIndexKey`, `useButtonType`, `noLabelWithoutControl`, `useKeyWithClickEvents`. Wholesale fix tracked as a separate tech-debt PR.
- **`as any` in `electron/ipc/finance.ts`** at the `ingestCsvFolder(db as any, ...)` call — Drizzle generic limitation, documented inline.
- **Lockfile drift after `npm install`** — when Linux-platform optional deps (`@emnapi/*`, `@electron/windows-sign`, etc.) drop out of `package-lock.json` because npm on macOS skips them, the fix is `rm -rf node_modules package-lock.json && npm install --include=optional`. Don't suggest pinning npm or adding shims.
- **Dark theme defaults.** Compass is dark-first. Don't suggest light-theme-first patterns or "consider supporting both".
- **The `tsconfig.web.json` / `tsconfig.node.json` split.** Two configs are intentional — renderer vs. main process have different `lib` and `types`.

---

## Conventions to match

### Branch & commit
- Branch: `feat/<slug>` / `fix/<slug>` / `chore/<slug>` / `docs/<slug>` / `refactor/<slug>`
- Conventional Commits subject: `<type>: <subject>` — lowercase after the colon, imperative mood, ≤72 chars
- Body explains WHY (not WHAT — diff shows that)
- `Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>` if Claude touched the commit

### PR body must include
- 1–3 bullet **Summary** of what ships
- **Test plan** checklist:
  - `npm run typecheck` clean
  - `npx biome check .` 0 errors (warnings ok)
  - `npm run test:run` passes
  - At least one manual verification step
- Screenshots / GIF for any UI change
- A `.changeset/<slug>.md` for user-visible changes

### IPC three-file pattern
Adding a new `window.api.foo.bar()` requires changes in:
1. `electron/ipc/foo.ts` — handler with input validation
2. `electron/preload.ts` — `bar: (...) => ipcRenderer.invoke('foo:bar', ...)`
3. `src/types/electron.d.ts` — `bar(...): Promise<...>` signature

All three in the same PR. Reject if any are missing.

### Test colocation
`electron/integrations/finance.ts` → `electron/integrations/finance.test.ts` next to it. Vitest. Run with `npm run test:run`.

### Coverage thresholds (vitest config)
Security-critical surfaces have minimum coverage gates:
- `electron/ipc/**/*.ts` — 70% lines/funcs/statements, 60% branches
- `electron/knowledge/**/*.ts` — 70% / 60%

A PR that drops coverage below these should explain why.

---

## When suggesting fixes in a review comment

Each finding should include:
1. **The exact file + line range**
2. **One sentence** of rationale tied to a rule above (e.g., "violates the path-traversal hard constraint")
3. **A concrete code suggestion** — not "consider refactoring", but actual replacement code

If you don't have enough context to suggest the fix, say so and ask a question instead of producing vague guidance.

---

## Pointers (deep detail lives here, don't duplicate)

- Master plan / phase checklist — [`docs/implementation_plan.md`](../../docs/implementation_plan.md)
- DB schema, IPC handler map, security model — [`docs/architecture.md`](../../docs/architecture.md)
- TS/React style + IPC + toast patterns — [`docs/conventions.md`](../../docs/conventions.md)
- Adding a new external service integration — [`docs/integrations.md`](../../docs/integrations.md)
- Knowledge auto-update + diff view + suggest-edit — [`docs/knowledge-extractor.md`](../../docs/knowledge-extractor.md)
- Multi-agent orchestration via worktrees — [`docs/agent-orchestration.md`](../../docs/agent-orchestration.md)
- Commit message format — [`.claude/output-styles/commit-mode.md`](../../.claude/output-styles/commit-mode.md)
- PR template — [`.github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md`](../PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md)
